title: Los Santos International Airport
popupHtml:
Los Santos International Airport

Los Santos International Airport (LSIA) is an international airport located in Los Santos, to the west of the Port of South Los Santos and to the south of La Puerta. LSIA has 3 runways, 1 on its north-western side and 2 on its southern side. The airport is based off the Los Angeles International Airport. The airport also offers a flight school, which can be used by all 3 characters to boost their flight skills. The airport consists of three runways, two of which are used for large commercial jets while the third for smaller business jets. This is the first game in the HD universe that has planes that can take off and land on there own. It is also the first game in the HD universe that allows the player to fully control the large boeing 747 commercial jets. The airport has 2 unique jumps, witch is a small runway ad that moves up to a 90 degree angle. **Note**: A 3-star wanted level is obtained upon entering this area. This can be avoided by purchasing an aircraft hangar.

title: Maze Bank Tower
popupHtml:
Maze Bank Tower

The tallest tower in the game that is the replica of the U.S. Bank Tower in Los Angeles. Tallest tower/building west of the Mississippi. Building info: [Wikipedia](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/U.S._Bank_Tower_%28Los_Angeles%29) Note: On top of this tower, you can find [Epsilon Tract #9](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13142).
